requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety and Coastal Environmental Protection

summary.en: Dominica Bureau of Standards (DBOS) is the national standards body. For EV conductive charging equipment, the practical safety baseline should be IEC 61851-1 for general EVSE requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment, supported by enclosure, earthing, interlock, residual-current, overcurrent, over-temperature, isolation-monitoring, and emergency-stop evidence. Because Dominica is a hurricane-exposed, humid, salt-mist coastal island, outdoor chargers also need corrosion-resistant enclosure materials, high ingress protection, UV resistance, wind and rain protection, surge protection, and thermal derating for tropical service.
summary.zh: 多米尼克标准局（DBOS）是国家标准机构。对于电动汽车传导充电设备，实务安全基线应为IEC 61851-1通用EVSE要求和IEC 61851-23直流电动汽车供电设备要求，并提供外壳、接地、互锁、剩余电流、过流、过温、绝缘监测和急停证据。由于多米尼克是暴露于飓风、高湿度和盐雾的沿海岛国，户外充电桩还需要耐腐蚀外壳材料、高防护等级、抗紫外、防风雨、浪涌保护以及热带工况热降额。
summary.zht: 多米尼克標準局（DBOS）是國家標準機構。對於電動汽車傳導充電設備，實務安全基線應為IEC 61851-1通用EVSE要求和IEC 61851-23直流電動汽車供電設備要求，並提供外殼、接地、互鎖、剩餘電流、過流、過溫、絕緣監測和急停證據。由於多米尼克是暴露於颶風、高濕度和鹽霧的沿海島國，戶外充電樁還需要耐腐蝕外殼材料、高防護等級、抗紫外、防風雨、浪涌保護以及熱帶工況熱降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system, general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — IP Code for enclosure ingress protection
IEC 60068-2-52 — salt mist cyclic corrosion testing
DBOS standards and conformity assessment requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system general requirements, with China-specific connectors and communication. GB/T safety reports may help engineering review but do not replace an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC test evidence, or DBOS-requested documentation for Dominica.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统通用要求，其中包含中国特有接口和通信要求。GB/T安全报告可支持工程审查，但不能替代IEC 61851逐条矩阵、认可IEC测试证据或DBOS要求的多米尼克文件。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統通用要求，其中包含中國特有接口和通訊要求。GB/T安全報告可支持工程審查，但不能替代IEC 61851逐條矩陣、認可IEC測試證據或DBOS要求的多米尼克文件。

gap.en: Prepare IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 evidence, IP and IK enclosure certificates, salt-mist or corrosion evidence for coastal service, tropical thermal derating, surge-protection ratings, installation instructions for hurricane-season anchoring and drainage, and maintenance instructions for tourism or fleet operators. GB/T 18487 evidence alone leaves connector, environmental, and IEC clause gaps.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23证据、IP和IK外壳证书、沿海工况盐雾或腐蚀证据、热带热降额、浪涌保护额定值、飓风季固定和排水安装说明，以及面向旅游或车队运营商的维护说明。仅有GB/T 18487证据会留下接口、环境和IEC条款差距。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23證據、IP和IK外殼證書、沿海工況鹽霧或腐蝕證據、熱帶熱降額、浪涌保護額定值、颶風季固定和排水安裝說明，以及面向旅遊或車隊運營商的維護說明。僅有GB/T 18487證據會留下接口、環境和IEC條款差距。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical and likely mandatory where DBOS, DOMLEC, importer, tender, insurer, or site owner requires IEC-family safety evidence; confirm exact DBOS conformity route before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487 as a design input only. A Dominica-ready package should include IEC 61851 safety evidence plus coastal hurricane, salt-mist, ingress, surge, and tropical derating documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487视为设计输入。面向多米尼克的资料包应包括IEC 61851安全证据，以及沿海飓风、盐雾、防水防尘、浪涌和热带降额文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487視為設計輸入。面向多米尼克的資料包應包括IEC 61851安全證據，以及沿海颶風、鹽霧、防水防塵、浪涌和熱帶降額文件。
